subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon and hearkened unto that which the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و سمع ما نطق به لسان العظمه انه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @proclamation to the people of the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
